Project.NAME: TG Contact Extractor
Project.keywords: Telegram, parser, contact-extraction, LLM, OpenRouter, Gemini-Flash, JSON, Excel, desktop-app, CustomTkinter, prompt-management
Project.annotation: Desktop application for extracting configurable data from Telegram Desktop chat exports using LLM with prompt management, dual output (JSON + Excel), and model benchmarking

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Configuration management: .env, config.json, free models list, exe/dev path resolution

fn-_app_dir.PURPOSE: Resolve exe vs dev root directory

type-AppConfig.PURPOSE: Dataclass: openrouter_api_key, model, batch_size, max_tokens_per_batch, language

M-PARSER.NAME: Parser
M-PARSER.purpose: Parse Telegram Desktop JSON export into normalized Message objects

type-Message.PURPOSE: Dataclass: id, date, from_user, from_id, text, reply_to_id

M-BATCHER.NAME: Batcher
M-BATCHER.purpose: Group messages into batches for LLM API calls

fn-make_batches.PURPOSE: Split by count and token limit

M-EXTRACTOR.NAME: Extractor
M-EXTRACTOR.purpose: LLM API integration with configurable prompts and prompt file management

fn-extract_contacts.PURPOSE: Process one batch with given system prompt

M-WRITER.NAME: Writer
M-WRITER.purpose: JSON serialization with metadata (including prompt) and incremental flush

fn-write_json.PURPOSE: Write final JSON with prompt in metadata

M-EXCEL.NAME: Excel
M-EXCEL.purpose: Convert JSON to formatted Excel with dynamic columns, type normalization, summary

fn-main.PURPOSE: CLI entry point for standalone JSON->Excel conversion

M-APP.NAME: App
M-APP.purpose: Tabbed GUI (CustomTkinter) + CLI, dual output JSON+Excel, prompt editor
M-APP.depends: M-CONFIG, M-PARSER, M-BATCHER, M-EXTRACTOR, M-WRITER, M-EXCEL

fn-run_pipeline.PURPOSE: Async: parse -> batch -> extract -> JSON -> Excel

M-BENCH.NAME: Benchmark
M-BENCH.purpose: Benchmark speed and quality of free OpenRouter models

fn-run_benchmark.PURPOSE: Async test all models on sample

type-BenchmarkResult.PURPOSE: Dataclass: model_id, time, contacts, valid_json, error

CrossLink.relation: reads API key and model list
